name: basalted-api
description: Basalt cloud API — Hono on Cloudflare Workers.

scripts.migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply basalt-staging-db --env staging --remote
scripts.migrate:prod: wrangler d1 migrations apply basalt-prod-db --env production --remote
scripts.test: echo "basalted-api: tests run from root via 'bun run test'" && exit 0
